# === canonical (hand-written; preserved by generator) ===
#
# full_redact replaces any value with the constant [REDACTED]. No
# information about length, content, or character class survives.
#
# Spec example from RuleInfo: "anything → [REDACTED]".

# Spec example
anything	[REDACTED]

# Short ASCII
a	[REDACTED]
ab	[REDACTED]
abc	[REDACTED]
hello	[REDACTED]
Hello, World!	[REDACTED]

# Already-redacted input — round-trips to the same marker
[REDACTED]	[REDACTED]
[REDACTED][REDACTED]	[REDACTED]

# Whitespace-only inputs
 
  
	

# Common sensitive value shapes — every one collapses to the same marker
123-45-6789	[REDACTED]
4111111111111111	[REDACTED]
alice@example.com	[REDACTED]
+44 20 7946 0958	[REDACTED]
https://example.com/secret?token=abc	[REDACTED]
sk_test_PLACEHOLDER_NOT_A_REAL_KEY	[REDACTED]

# Long ASCII
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.	[REDACTED]

# Unicode — multi-byte and combining characters
café	[REDACTED]
naïve	[REDACTED]
日本語	[REDACTED]
😀😀😀	[REDACTED]
👨‍👩‍👧‍👦	[REDACTED]
Zoë	[REDACTED]

# Right-to-left scripts
שלום	[REDACTED]
مرحبا	[REDACTED]

# Numeric edge cases
0	[REDACTED]
-1	[REDACTED]
3.14159	[REDACTED]
1e10	[REDACTED]

# Punctuation-only
.	[REDACTED]
!?	[REDACTED]
"""	[REDACTED]

# Newline-bearing (decoded by pragma) and tab — confirm full_redact ignores them
# corpus: escaped
multi\nline\tvalue	[REDACTED]
\x00\x01\x02	[REDACTED]
